scale_caveat: 1:10,000,000 global outline. Adequate for showing where a route runs; not a navigational chart. Depth constraints come from bathymetry, never from this outline.

basemap.source: Sentinel-2 cloudless 2020, EOX IT Services GmbH
basemap.attribution: Sentinel-2 cloudless by EOX / modified Copernicus Sentinel data 2020 (CC BY 4.0)
basemap.caveat: Satellite imagery, not a navigational chart. No depth, no aids to navigation, and it is an annual composite showing no particular day.
